Luxury mobile bar service for unforgettable events

Barcode Cocktails provides a luxury mobile bar service for weddings, private parties, and corporate events. We supply the bar setup, equipment, cocktail knowledge, and years of hands-on experience, while the client provides the alcohol. We also offer consultation to help shape your drinks menu, service style, and overall event theme.

Request a Quote

Premium dry hire mobile bar service with consultation, equipment, and experienced bartending for events across United Kingdom.

About Barcode

Barcode Cocktails is built around professional service, polished presentation, and a premium event experience. We work with clients who want something more personal than a standard drinks service, with support on the look, feel, and style of the bar setup for their event.

How it works

We do not provide alcohol. The client supplies the alcohol, and we provide the equipment, bar tools, setup, cocktail knowledge, and experienced service needed to run the bar smoothly. We can also consult on cocktail ideas, menu planning, and the kind of theme or atmosphere you want for your event.

Services

All packages are tailored to the event. Clients provide the alcohol, while we provide the equipment, setup, planning support, and professional cocktail service.

Weddings

Elegant cocktail service for receptions, evening celebrations, and all-day wedding events, with consultation on menu style and presentation.

Get a Quote

Private Parties

Perfect for birthdays, house parties, engagement celebrations, and private events with drinks and service tailored to your theme.

Get a Quote

Corporate Events

Professional bar service for launches, staff events, networking nights, and branded occasions with a sharp and polished setup.

Get a Quote

Meet the Co-Founders

Barcode Cocktails is led by two co-founders who both bring over 10 years of hands-on hospitality experience. We built this business from the ground up with a shared passion for great service, quality cocktails, and creating memorable events that feel polished and personal.

Ace

Ace spent over 10 years in London hospitality, beginning as a barback and progressing through the industry from the ground up. While studying, he part-timed in hospitality and graduated as a software developer, before choosing to follow his passion and commit to hospitality full time. His background includes guest experience, cocktail making, and bar management.

Jay

Jay also has over 10 years of hospitality experience, starting from the ground up in Northern Ireland and working his way through the industry. He began as a runner and went on to work across pubs, events, and hotels, progressing into mixology and duty management. His experience in guest service, cocktail making, and bar operations helps ensure every event feels polished, calm, and well looked after.

Together, we started Barcode Cocktails to combine our experience and deliver a premium bar service that feels seamless, professional, and memorable from start to finish.

Request a Quote

Tell us about your event, your preferred theme, and the kind of cocktail experience you want. We can help you plan the setup, menu direction, and service style, while you provide the alcohol for the event.

Contact

You can also get in touch directly for bookings, availability, and event planning.
